positive: A stylized, modern minimalist illustration of a smiling celestial creature—a combination of a fox and a crescent moon, rendered with elegant, flowing lines. The creature should be seated in a perfect butterfly silhouette, surrounded by abstract, gently floating cosmic dust and star particles. The background should be a deep indigo gradient, contrasting sharply with gold foil-like accents and soft pastel glows (blush pink and lavender). The overall style must be high-contrast vector art, optimized for screen printing or embroidery, ensuring clean, defined edges and strong silhouettes against a light garment. Central composition, highly detailed yet simplified.
